title: applehv: vfkit gui often does not appear with log-level == debug
body:
### Issue Description

I observe this in all versions of podman but for `applehv`, i mostly work in HEAD.  With some frequency, when I run

`podman --log-level debug machine init --image-path https://fedorapeople.org/groups/podman/testing/applehv/arm64/fedora-coreos-38.20230925.dev.0-applehv.aarch64.raw.gz --now`

the GUI does not launch itself.

At this point, i cannot tell if this is a problem with podman, vfkit, or vz.  Any or all could be a factor.

comments.body: @jakecorrenti @ashley-cui seen this much before? @gbraad how you folks ?
I recall seeing this but not frequently.
fetched and rebased main and works fine for me. I'm on Intel, though.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
